title: August 17th, 2021 (2)
body:
- ## daily notes
    - my 5 communities
        - private
            - 12:32 pm, august 17th, 2021
the ironies of autistic empathy
tags:
                -
                - i was bullied endlessly until about 9th grade for reasons i couldn't tell you
                - throughout elementary school i was asked by teachers to help other kids understand concepts they were struggling with and i did so by adopting and coexploring from their current perspective
            - 12:54 pm, august 17th, 2021

            - 07:51 am, august 17th, 2021
lyrics
tags:
                -
                - you've changed too
                - i remember what you used to do
                - wanted to say excuse
                - me not taking the low road
                - but i didn't
                - i took the high road instead
                - now i'm hidden
            - 12:18 pm, august 17th, 2021
don't be afraid of discussing principles. there are no wrong answers and it can change the rest of your life
tags:
                -
            - 12:24 pm, august 17th, 2021
we can patronize to walkers or empathize with  them
tags: niantic game design
                -
                -  we may not be able to empathize with walking as well as we can patronize it
                    - if we must patronize walking we also must find another higher scope of gameplay that is not patronizing
            - 01:42 pm, august 17th, 2021
an [[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]ist does things they think are worthwhile and they want to share
tags:
                -
                -  a priest does things they are told are worthwhile and they want to edify
                - a ___ does things they think are worthwhile and they want to capitalize
                - a ___ does things they are told are worthwhile and want to dogmatize
                - capitalism is denying us our [[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]istic birthright
                - dogmatism is denying us our divinity
